name: Peoples State Bank, Fairmount, N. D.
description_short: Community bank in Fairmount, ND since 1895, offering personal and commercial banking with locations in Fairmount and Wahpeton.
description_long:
Peoples State Bank was originally chartered in 1895 as the Bank of Fairmount by local business and professional leaders, including original stockholder Bartholomew Schouweiler. The institution merged with First National Bank of Fairmount during the 1930s Depression and was renamed Peoples State Bank in 1956 under President Earl W. Schouweiler, Sr. Today it operates as a privately held community bank with deep historical roots in North Dakota, currently led by fourth-generation banker Bartholomew A. Schouweiler.

Peoples State Bank provides comprehensive banking services including personal loans, commercial financing, agricultural lending, mortgage services, and deposit products (savings, checking, CDs). The bank emphasizes a full-service approach with loan departments ready to assist customers with personal, commercial, and agricultural financing needs. They offer online financial planning tools including mortgage calculators, loan payment calculators, savings calculators, and mortgage qualification assessments.

The bank distinguishes itself as a locally-owned and community-focused institution where the majority of stockholders are area residents involved in business and farming. This contrasts with larger regional or national banks, positioning Peoples State as an institution with vested interest in local economic development. Their tagline "Proud to be YOUR Community Bank" reflects this positioning.

As a regional community bank with only two physical locations, Peoples State Bank serves a limited geographic area in North Dakota. While their website provides basic information and online calculators, detailed product specifics, current rates, and fee structures are not published online, requiring direct contact with their loan department or branches for comprehensive information. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Established 129-year history demonstrating stability and longevity in the Fairmount community
Locally-owned and privately operated with majority stockholders being area residents and business owners
Fourth-generation family leadership providing continuity and local commitment
Offers diverse lending products including personal, commercial, and agricultural financing
Provides online calculators for mortgage qualification, loan payments, and savings planning
Two convenient locations in Fairmount and Wahpeton, North Dakota
E-statement access and online banking services available
cons: Limited geographic footprint with only two branch locations in North Dakota
Website lacks detailed product information, current interest rates, and fee schedules
No published APY rates or loan terms available online; requires direct contact for quotes
Limited online presence compared to larger regional or national banks
Website content is minimal with basic informational pages rather than comprehensive product details
best_for: North Dakota residents in Fairmount and Wahpeton seeking personalized community banking relationships
Farmers and agricultural business owners needing specialized ag lending and rural financing
Local business owners and entrepreneurs requiring commercial loans and business banking services
diagnosis: Peoples State Bank is best suited for North Dakota residents in the Fairmount and Wahpeton areas who value community-focused banking, personal relationships, and local ownership. The primary caveat is that detailed product information and current rates are not published online, requiring direct phone contact or branch visits to obtain specific loan terms, APY rates, and fee information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
